reasoning: Addressing your lactate clearance limiter is critical for improving fatigue resistance and closing the gap in your power drop-off. With your last ride indicating a modest intensity, this session will challenge your system and better prepare you for the sustained effort required on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x9 minutes: 2 min at 242-256W, 7 min at 201-218W. Short recovery between efforts.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
